description: Binary struct definitions for parsing Jade Dynasty (ZX) task data files at version 165 (ELEMENTDATA_VERSION 0x1000009e). All structs compiled with MSVC #pragma pack(1), 32-bit pointers (4 bytes). All integers little-endian.

files.tasks_index.json: tasks.data master index header — magic, version, pack count, MD5 checksums.
files.tasks_pack.json: tasks.dataN pack header — magic, item count, offset table for top-level tasks.
files.task_record.json: Complete LoadBinary sequence for one task record — fixed data + all variable sections + recursive sub-tasks.
files.fixed_data.json: ATaskTemplFixedData — the 2490-byte fixed block at the start of every record. All 140+ fields with exact offsets.
files.compare_expression.json: COMPARE_EXPRESSION — 68-byte expression comparison block (prerequisites and finish conditions).
files.abase_vector.json: abase::vector<T> — 16-byte vector struct; _cur_size at +12 drives variable-section reads.
files.task_expression.json: TASK_EXPRESSION — 8-byte compiled expression token (int opcode + float value).
files.award_data.json: AWARD_DATA — 957-byte fixed reward block with 8 variable sub-sections.
files.award_ratio_scale.json: AWARD_RATIO_SCALE — probability-tiered award (m_ulScales + floats + AWARD_DATA array).
files.talk_proc.json: talk_proc — variable-length NPC dialogue tree (5 per task).
files.talk_window.json: talk_window — one dialogue screen within a talk_proc.
